title: Hardcoded Twitter bearer token in source
description: extractors/twitter/twitter.go:58 contains a real Twitter API bearer token.
recommendation: Move to environment variable or config file

title: Hardcoded Weibo session cookie in source
recommendation: Remove hardcoded credential, use cookie flag only

title: TLS certificate verification globally disabled
description: request/request.go:56 sets InsecureSkipVerify: true on all connections.
recommendation: Remove InsecureSkipVerify, add per-site exception if needed

title: OpenSSF score 3.2/10
description: 0/10 on Maintained, Pinned-Dependencies, Security-Policy, Fuzzing, Token-Permissions, Branch-Protection, Signed-Releases, SAST.

title: FFmpeg concat with -safe 0 disables path checks
description: utils/ffmpeg.go:75 uses -safe 0 flag, disabling path validation in ffmpeg concat demuxer.
recommendation: Remove -safe 0, sanitize paths in playlist file

title: TOCTOU in file download resume
description: downloader/downloader.go:138-159 checks file size then opens for append without atomicity.
recommendation: Use file locking or atomic operations

title: Temp files created with 0644 permissions
description: Download temp files are world-readable. Should be 0600.

title: CONTRIBUTING.md minimal (23 lines)
description: No architecture docs, no extractor dev guide, no testing methodology.

title: Tests depend on live APIs
description: 52 test files hit real video site endpoints. 3/5 recent CI runs failing. No mocks or fixtures.
recommendation: Add mock/fixture layer for CI stability

title: 535 open issues
description: High issue count relative to maintainer bandwidth. OpenSSF Maintained score 0/10.

title: Excellent init()-based plugin registry
description: 46 extractors via single-method interface + init() registration. Zero boilerplate.

title: Per-site CI generation from template
description: 45 workflows auto-generated via Node script. Per-extractor regression isolation.
